name: CortIQ
description: CortIQ is the first web analytics platform with dedicated tracking for AI agents — ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, and Claude Browser. Provides cookie-free server-side analytics, GDPR-compliant CMP, heatmaps, A/B testing, and form analytics.

capabilities.description: Ingest page views, clicks, custom events, and form interactions from any website
Detect and classify AI agents (ChatGPT Browser, Perplexity Comet, Claude Browser) visiting a website, including journey funnel and conversion attribution
Query aggregated analytics data: traffic sources, device breakdown, top pages, AI agent sessions, heatmap data
Retrieve click heatmap data for any tracked page, segmented by device type
Run an AI-visibility audit on any URL: GEO score, llms.txt presence, AI crawler access, schema markup detection
